channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study finds no brain benefit from omega-3 fish oil supplements
item.description: Fish oil delivered omega-3s to the brain, but a two-year study showed no meaningful improvements in memory, cognition, or Alzheimer's risk.

item.title: Soil microbes may help crops thrive in salty farmland
item.description: Researchers found that beneficial soil bacteria give plants a survival advantage in salty soils, not by helping them retain water but through other means.

item.title: Physicists create a novel quantum state known as a fractional Fermi sea
item.description: Scientists have demonstrated that ultracold atoms can be forced into an unusual quantum state, the fractional Fermi sea, where particles arrange in...

item.title: Brain activity during anesthesia challenges existing ideas about consciousness
item.description: The unconscious brain may be more active than previously thought. Researchers found that patients under general anesthesia could still...
